title: Create a Community Forum on Monday.com
excerpt: I am relatively new to Monday.com and loving finding way to bring it more and more in to our business. One of the ideas I have had is to try and build an internal forum, much like this one, to get feedback, answer questi…

posts.author: andyoungy (Andy Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am relatively new to Monday.com and loving finding way to bring it more and more in to our business. One of the ideas I have had is to try and build an internal forum, much like this one, to get feedback, answer questions and connect our team that are spread all over the UK.

While I am not sure on the engagement I would get yet internally I wondered if anyone has done anything like this? Started an internal forum/intranet for your business?

Sorry if this is in the wrong place as didn’t think it was a use case as I haven’t done anything yet and not really a feature request as I am sure all the features are there that might be needed for this type or board! Thanks all
